query:
INSERT IGNORE INTO tenantUsers (tenantId, role, name, email, passwordHash, isActive)
VALUES
  (1, 'dispatcher', 'James Chen', 'dispatch@acmehvac.com', '$2a$12$placeholder', 1),
  (1, 'technician', 'Mike Torres', 'tech@acmehvac.com', '$2a$12$placeholder', 1),
  (2, 'manager', 'Lisa Park', 'admin@plumbpro.com', '$2a$12$placeholder', 1),
  (3, 'manager', 'Dan Rosenblat', 'admin@nvc360.com', '$2a$12$placeholder', 1);

SELECT t.id, t.slug, t.companyName, tu.email, tu.role
FROM tenants t
LEFT JOIN tenantUsers tu ON tu.tenantId = t.id
ORDER BY t.id;
